act_boundaries.description: Paragraph indices (0-based integers) marking act transitions.

climax_paragraph.description: Zero-based paragraph index where the climax occurs.

color_palette_guidance.description: Free-form color/palette direction for downstream image prompts.

lighting_arc.description: Free-form description of how lighting evolves through the story.

pacing_signature.description: Free-form description of the story's pacing rhythm.

creative_direction.description: Free-form summary of the overall visual creative direction.

shot_plan.description: Free-form shot-planning guidance for the storyboard.

motion_plan.description: Free-form motion-planning guidance for animated scenes.

paragraph_analyses.description: Per-paragraph analytic notes; one entry per paragraph in the story.

paragraph_index.description: Zero-based index of the paragraph being analyzed.

tension.description: Narrative tension score on a 1-10 integer scale, where 1 = calm/exposition and 10 = peak conflict/climax. Must be a number, not a prose description.

grouping_hint.description: Optional hint for downstream narration_grouping (free-form prose).

grouping_rationale.description: Optional rationale for the grouping hint (free-form prose).

viewer_emotion.description: Free-form target viewer emotion at this paragraph.

character_archetypes.description: List of character archetype entries identified in the story.

name.description: Character's name as referenced in the story.

narrator_visibility.description: Whether the narrator appears in-frame, off-frame, or not at all (free-form label).

visual_note.description: Free-form visual continuity note for this character.
